world.name: Classic High Fantasy
world.lore_summary: The journey begins. The town's festivities fade behind you, replaced by the encroaching, dry silence of the foothills. The map provided by Sister Elara guides you toward the 'Broken Anvil', a landmark of jagged pillars where the trade road meets the salt flats.
world.current_location: The deep desert, following the Mightstone's pull toward the obsidian beacon.
world.story_notes:
fulfill his destiny. Kel has always been a bit of a loner, with no previous romantic partners, but he does have a certain interest in women. His family, while important, has never been overly involved in his life, allowing him to forge his own path. As he ventures into the unknown, Kel's charisma and magical prowess will be put to the test, but with his quick wit and innate charm, he's ready to face whatever challenges come his way.

Level 2 Spell: Hold Person.
The Mightstone is now inside Kel, acting as a compass toward the Netheril ruins.

weather.description: A gentle breeze carries the sweet scent of blooming wildflowers through the town.

world.session_recap: After a harrowing encounter with the Kruthiks in the cellar, Kel secured the support of the innkeeper, Gorin, who promised to seal the breach. Kel spent a restorative night in the inn's study, waking up to the vibrant, bustling atmosphere of the town's Harvest Festival. With his health recovered and a plan to seek out Sister Elara at the shrine of Lathander to address his lingering wound and potential recruitment, Kel stands at a crossroads between the festive revelry and his arduous journey ahead.

party.name: Kel
party.description: Kel is a Tiefling Sorcerer with a mysterious past, hailing from a long line of draconic sorcerer tieflings. He stands at average height with dark brown hair and dark blue eyes, but what sets him apart is the absence of protruding horns, a rare trait among his kind. With a charming demeanor and a silver tongue, Kel has a way with people, often talking his way out of sticky situations. His current quest is to find the fabled 'Mightstone', an artifact rumored to contain the soul of an ancient powerful dragon, which is said to be hidden somewhere in the ancient Netheril desert. This perilous journey is part of his sorcerer ceremony, a rite of passage to fulfill his destiny. Kel has always been a bit of a loner, with no previous romantic partners, but he does have a certain interest in women. His family, while important, has never been overly involved in his life, allowing him to forge his own path. As he ventures into the unknown, Kel's charisma and magical prowess will be put to the test, but with his quick wit and innate charm, he's ready to face whatever challenges come his way.

npcs.name: Gorin
npcs.notes: Offers to help Kel with a map to find the Netheril desert | Offers to help Kel with information about the Netheril desert

npcs.name: Sister Elara
npcs.notes: A Lathanderian cleric, observant and intelligent. Looks after the local shrine.

quests.title: The Dragon's Legacy
quests.description: Find the fabled Mightstone in the ancient Netheril desert and uncover the meaning behind the cryptic family trial: 'Make yourself a dragon'.

steps.description: Gather information about the location of the Netheril desert from Gorin or other locals
Secure a map or guide to navigate the dangerous wastes
Locate the Mightstone within the desert ruins
Fulfill the trial to 'make yourself a dragon'

quests.title: The Morninglord's Relic
quests.description: Sister Elara has tasked you with retrieving a satchel marked with the seal of the Morninglord from a fallen guard near the 'Broken Anvil' in the western foothills. Successfully returning it will grant you a map and potentially a companion for your journey.

steps.description: Travel to the 'Broken Anvil' in the western foothills.
Retrieve the satchel from the fallen guard.
Return the satchel to Sister Elara at the shrine.

Kel handed over the satchel to Sister Elara after being coerced, believing it was the only way to fulfill his destiny and perhaps gain power, despite his deep reservations and fear of the 'ritual'.
Kel surrendered to Sister Elara's ritual, approaching the altar to potentially become the conduit for the power within the satchel.
